<?php namespace Faker\Provider\zh_CN; class PhoneNumber extends \Faker\Provider\PhoneNumber { protected static $operators = [ 134, 135, 136, 137, 138, 139, 147, 150, 151, 152, 157, 158, 159, 1705, 178, 182, 183, 184, 187, 188, // China Mobile 130, 131, 132, 145, 155, 156, 1707, 1708, 1709, 1718, 1719, 176, 185, 186, // China Unicom 133, 153, 1700, 1701, 177, 180, 181, 189, // China Telecom 170, 171, // virtual operators ]; protected static $formats = ['###########']; public function phoneNumber() { $operator = static::randomElement(static::$operators); $format = static::randomElement(static::$formats); return $operator . static::numerify(substr($format, 0, strlen($format) - strlen($operator))); } }
